name: Uzair Sabir
track: A: Agent Builders / B: Content & Research / C: Design & UX / D: 3D & Visualization / E: QA & Security
my_twin: I would track my daily energy levels, sleep patterns, and work output across different times of the day. I often feel highly productive late at night but experience a noticeable drop in focus during the afternoon. I want to understand how sleep quality, screen time, and meal timing affect my cognitive performance so I can optimize my schedule for deep work and learning.
